title: Prosjektportalen Package Catalog
description: Schema for validating the central package catalog (catalog.json) that indexes all available template packages

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp of last catalog update (ISO 8601 format)

cloudCompatible.description: Whether the package can run as a skymal (cloud template). False = needs hub-side provisioning the cloud path can't reproduce; the catalog/wizard warn 'at own risk'. Absent = true.

cloudCompatibleReason.description: Optional. Shown when cloudCompatible is false — a short, user-facing explanation (Norwegian) of what hub-side content blocks cloud use (e.g. a taxonomy term set provisioned to the term store).

requiresBestillingsportalen.description: Whether the package requires Bestillingsportalen for full use. Shown as a dependency tag. Absent = not required.

requiresEntra.description: Whether the package requires Microsoft Entra resources for full use. Shown as a dependency tag. Absent = not required.

languages.description: Locales the package is available in, as BCP-47 codes (e.g. 'nb-NO', 'en-US'). Shown as an availability tag in the catalog details. Absent = Norwegian only.

hidden.description: When true, the catalog UI filters the package out of the list, filters and search (it remains in this file). Used to stage packages that aren't ready to publish. Absent = visible.

icon.description: Fluent UI icon name shown next to the package title (e.g. 'Page', 'BuildDefinition')

thumbnail.description: Full URL to thumbnail image (GitHub raw URL)

screenshots.description: Full URLs (GitHub raw) to screenshot images, shown as a carousel with a full-size lightbox in the details pane

downloadUrl.description: Full URL to download the .pppkg file. A raw URL into the hosting repo's dist/ folder (raw.githubusercontent.com), which is CORS-enabled — GitHub release download URLs are not, and are blocked by the browser when the SPFx catalog fetches them.

publishedDate.description: Date when this version was published (YYYY-MM-DD)

changelogUrl.description: Full URL to the package's CHANGELOG.md (GitHub raw URL)
